pi_items.source: FITS file header (INSTRUME: WFPC2) downloaded from esahubble.org
FITS file header (TARGNAME: M16-A, FILTNAM1: F656N corresponds to H-alpha)
Task documentation and export_result.sh / verifier.py logic
Task documentation and export_result.sh / verifier.py logic

privileged_info_summary: The task uses real astronomical data from the NASA/ESA Hubble Space Telescope WFPC2 instrument, targeting the Eagle Nebula (M16) in H-alpha (F656N filter), downloaded directly from esahubble.org. The expected output files are correctly specified as /home/ga/AstroImages/nebula_analysis/starless_ha.fits and /home/ga/AstroImages/nebula_analysis/suppression_stats.txt.
